$comment: Highlights <script lang="pts"> and <script lang="parabun"> content inside .svelte files using the parabun TS grammar. Scope-based injection: only fires when Svelte's own tokenizer has already set meta.lang.pts or meta.lang.parabun (which it derives from the lang= attribute). The opening tag's HTML-attribute styling stays intact because Svelte tokenizes that first. See parabun-ui-pjs-inject.tmLanguage.json for the pjs counterpart.
